title: cinchona cordifolia var. vera
intro: Cinchona cordifolia var. vera is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, commonly referred to as the 'Andean cinchona'. This plant is a variety of Cinchona cordifolia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the production of quinine, a natural antimalarial compound. The health benefits of Cinchona cordifolia var. vera include its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimalarial effects, making it a valuable remedy for treating fever, malaria, and other tropical diseases. Cinchona cordifolia var. vera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of malaria, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and discomfort.
